caption: The video shows a close-up view of a car's dashboard, focusing on the instrument cluster. The tachometer is visible on the left side, with the needle pointing to zero, indicating that the engine is not running. The central display screen shows a message instructing the driver to "Press Brake and Push Button to Start," accompanied by a red brake warning light. The odometer reading is displayed as 20434 miles. The scene remains static throughout the frames, suggesting that the car is stationary and the driver has not yet initiated the start sequence. The lighting and reflections on the dashboard indicate that it is daytime.
